series_metadata.series_description: Unitization application documents: hearing sign-in sheets, proof of publication of hearing notice, hearing participant lists, and opening remarks for the hearings.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: an Order is issued on application or request amendment or an application is withdrawn. If records are scanned into an electronic format, paper copy may be recycled at that time. ; Electronic: an Order is issued on application or request amendment or an application is withdrawn
